title: Sunteck Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Sunteck Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
